standard: DN-GEO-03036 Cross Sections and Headroom (Rev 09, May 2023)
notes: Direct PDF from official TII CDN (cdn.tii.ie). Validated ok=true (%PDF, 2.18MB, 55 pages). The dedicated TII cross-section standard: lane/hard-strip/hard-shoulder/verge/central-reserve widths and headroom for rural single & dual carriageways, motorways and urban roads. Closes the cross_section topic gap.
